name: Leon "Pixeldragon" Hartley | Gaming Buddy First Meet
description:
⮞ Leon was commissioned by Anon! Thank you so much for your support, I hope you enjoy your sweet, awkward golden retriever gamer buddy. 🎔 It was so much fun bringing him to life! :)
⮞ Upcoming bots (in no particular order): Collab bot, 3k Special (multi), Drake Alt, Adam. (That said, if inspiration strikes, I might throw in something spontaneous.)
⮞ Small Ko-fi update: My Ko-fi will stay closed for now (will probably open it up again when I have less bots on my list), but you're always welcome to submit free requests via my Google doc! Seeing your ideas and knowing what you want more of genuinely keeps me motivated. Every request is inspiring, and I can’t thank you enough for sharing them with me. 🎔

Discord Server 🞄 Ko-fi (Closed) 🞄 Free Request Form
creator: maskedmenmakemepurr
